title: clutia affinis var. phyllanthifolia
intro: Clutia affinis var. phyllanthifolia, also known as the Phyllanthus clusii, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Clutia affinis var. phyllanthifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal properties.
